ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variant_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source database */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_data" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the variant data */,
  "data_types" TEXT /* Type of genomic variant data */,
  "type_count" INTEGER /* Count of the genomic variant data types */,
  "other_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the variant data */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome number associated with the variant */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele of the variant */,
  "alternate_allele" TEXT /* Alternate allele of the variant */,
  "variant_class" TEXT /* Class of the variant (e.g., SNP, indel, etc.) */,
  "variant_subclass" TEXT /* Subclass of the variant (e.g., frameshift, missense, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES variant_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant data */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., Phenotype, GOA) */,
  "study" TEXT /* Associated study or database */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date of the annotation */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_data ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotype_data" (
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenotype */,
  "phenotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the phenotype */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species associated with the phenotype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phenotype */,
  "phenotype_category" TEXT /* Category of the phenotype (e.g., disease, trait, etc.) */,
  "phenotype_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the phenotype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_phenotype_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant data */,
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phenotype data */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link between the variant and phenotype (e.g., associated, not associated, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_phenotype_links_phenotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("phenotype_id") REFERENCES phenotype_data ("phenotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_phenotype_links_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_data ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
